During the time of the Rightly-Guided Caliphs .......................... 143 4.1 During the caliphate of Abu Bakr a~-$iddeeq. . . . . . . . . . . 143 4.1.1 Abu Bakr's reaction to the Prophet's death ......... 144 4.1.2 Saqeefah Bani Sa'idah ........................ 145 4.1.3 Some characteristics of Abu Bakr's rule ........... 149 4.1.4 'Ali's oath of allegiance to Abu Bakr a~-$iddeeq.... 150 4.1.5 Abu Bakr sends out the army ofUsamah .......... 153 4.1.6 The apostasy wars ............................ 156 4.2 During the caliphate of 'Umar ibn al-Khattab . . . . . . . . . . 158 4.3 During the caliphate of 'Othman ibn 'Affan. . . . . . . . . . . . 160 4.3.1 During the conquest ofNorthAfrica .............. 161 4.3.2 'Ali's attitude concerning the turmoil faced by 'Uthman . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 162 4.4 During the caliphate of his father, 'Ali binAbi Talib ..... 166 4.4.1 Commander of the Faithful 'Ali ibnAbi Talib sets out for Kufa ............. 166 4.4.2 Al-l:fasan's advice to his father. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 167 4.4.3 Al-l:fasan's impact on mobilising the people of Kufa. . . . . . . . . . . . . . 169 4.4.4 Attempts at reconciliation. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 170 4.4.5 The Battle of the Camel . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 170 4.4.6 Tlle Battle of $iffeen. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 172 4.4.7 Al-l:fasan's view concerning the wars ........................... 177

/ Contents 4.4.8 The martyrdom of Commander of the Faithful 'Ali ................ 179 4.4.9 Final advice of Commander of the Faithful 'Ali to his sons ..................... 180 4.4.10 Commander of the Faithful 'Ali prohibits mutilating his killer . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 185 4 .4 .11 Al-l:f asan 's speech after his father was slain . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 186 4.4.12 Mu'awiyah's reaction to the martyrdom of 'Ali ........................ 186
content_id: Pada masa Khalifah-Khalifah Rasyidin. 4.1 Pada masa kekhalifahan Abu Bakar ash-Shiddiq (ra). 4.1.1 Reaksi Abu Bakar (ra) atas wafatnya Nabi ﷺ. 4.1.2 Saqifah Bani Saidah. 4.1.3 Beberapa karakteristik pemerintahan Abu Bakar (ra). 4.1.4 Baiat Ali (ra) kepada Abu Bakar ash-Shiddiq (ra). 4.1.5 Abu Bakar (ra) memberangkatkan pasukan Usamah. 4.1.6 Perang-perang riddah (pemurtadan). 4.2 Pada masa kekhalifahan Umar ibn al-Khattab (ra). 4.3 Pada masa kekhalifahan Utsman ibn Affan (ra). 4.3.1 Pada masa penaklukan Afrika Utara. 4.3.2 Sikap Ali (ra) terhadap gejolak yang dihadapi Utsman (ra). 4.4 Pada masa kekhalifahan ayahnya, Ali ibn Abi Thalib (ra). 4.4.1 Amirul Mukminin Ali ibn Abi Thalib (ra) berangkat menuju Kufah. 4.4.2 Nasihat Al-Hasan (ra) kepada ayahnya. 4.4.3 Pengaruh Al-Hasan (ra) dalam memobilisasi penduduk Kufah. 4.4.4 Upaya-upaya rekonsiliasi. 4.4.5 Pertempuran Unta. 4.4.6 Pertempuran Shiffin. 4.4.7 Pandangan Al-Hasan (ra) tentang peperangan-peperangan tersebut. 4.4.8 Syahidnya Amirul Mukminin Ali (ra). 4.4.9 Wasiat terakhir Amirul Mukminin Ali (ra) kepada putra-putranya. 4.4.10 Amirul Mukminin Ali (ra) melarang mutilasi terhadap pembunuhnya. 4.4.11 Pidato Al-Hasan (ra) setelah terbunuhnya ayahnya. 4.4.12 Reaksi Muawiyah terhadap syahidnya Ali (ra).
